display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
METADATA GRAPH
─────────────
Start here. You cannot
govern what you
cannot describe.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
POLICY GRAPH
─────────────
Codify rules against
the assets Metadata
Graph describes.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
LINEAGE GRAPH
─────────────
Trace provenance.
Without lineage,
trust is unverifiable.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
DATA GRAPH
─────────────
Model business entities
once identity resolution
is viable.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
SEMANTIC GRAPH
─────────────
Define meaning.
Requires stable entities
and trusted lineage.

div.style: color: rgb(255, 255, 255) !important; font-weight: bold !important; font-size: 13px !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
REGULATORY GRAPH
─────────────
Map regulations to data,
policies, and semantics.
The capstone.
